content: Mobile nav in Next.js App Router: use 'use client' component with useState for open/closed. The current NAV_LINKS array has 5 items (Overview, Machines, Activity, Settings, Account). On mobile (< 768px) these overflow the h-12 header. Standard pattern: hide nav links with 'hidden md:flex' and show a hamburger button with 'md:hidden'. The burger opens a Sheet or dropdown menu. The existing layout.tsx is a server component, so the NavLinks component is already extracted as 'use client'. A mobile sheet/drawer can be added to NavLinks without touching the server layout. Tailwind classes: 'hidden md:flex' to hide links on mobile, 'md:hidden' for burger button.
